description: Archive report emitted by edgp archive-bundle or edgp verify-bundle-archive for deterministic EDGP static report bundle archives.

archive.description: Archive path requested by the caller or verified after handoff.

archiveSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of the archive when available, or null when the archive could not be read.

bundleDir.description: Resolved bundle directory that was archived, or the temporary extraction directory used during archive verification.

bundleSha256.description: Verified bundle fingerprint from the bundle manifest, or null when the manifest could not provide one.

ok.description: True when bundle archive creation or archive verification succeeded.

files.description: Number of bundle files included in the archive.

verificationFailures.description: Number of archive safety or bundle verification failures.

verification.description: Embedded edgp.report.bundle.verification.v1 result used as the archive gate.

title: EDGP Report Bundle Archive v1
